title: Output: 90-second personal story
subtitle: Build a longer spoken answer.
overview: Use opening, background, event, result, reflection.
This is B1 speaking stamina practice.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I want to tell an experience...
In the end I learned that...

items.es: Quiero contar una experiencia que tuve durante un viaje.
items.en: I want to tell an experience that I had during a trip.

items.es: Era mi primera vez en esa ciudad y estaba un poco perdido.
items.en: It was my first time in that city and I was a little lost.

items.es: Lo que pasó fue que tomé el autobús equivocado.
items.en: What happened was that I took the wrong bus.

items.es: Al principio me preocupé, pero una persona me ayudó.
items.en: At first I worried, but a person helped me.

items.es: Al final aprendí que pedir ayuda no es tan difícil.
items.en: In the end I learned that asking for help is not so difficult.
